name: 15oz Stoneware Mama Bear Mug - Threshold™: Mom Coffee Cup, Microwave & Dishwasher Safe, Hot Beverage Mugs
description:
The 15-Ounce Stoneware Mama Bear Mug from Threshold™ is sure to add some bear-y personalized flair to your mom's morning beverage. This white stoneware mug showcases a speckled finish, adorned with an etched typographic print that reads "Mama Bear" on the front for an added dose of special touch with every sip. Perfect to give as a gift to your mother or to keep to show off your own favorite title, the generously sized mug is ideal for serving hot and cold beverages, and it has a microwave- and dishwasher-safe design for easy, convenient use.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
